channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Freedom Is Worth the Risk
item.description: The free society is worth defending because the human person is worth defending.

item.title: Trump's Anti-Weaponization Fund, ballroom, and DNI chief may complicate immigration bill's passage
item.description: Republicans expected their filibuster-proof effort to fund immigration enforcement agencies through the remainder of Trump's term to be a...

item.title: Remove Bill Pulte
item.description: A top national security position should not be treated as a political prize.

item.title: U.S. journalist pleads guilty to acting as an illegal agent for China
item.description: An American journalist who has lived in China since 2010 and worked for several state media organizations there pleaded guilty in a U.S. court Thursday.
